scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run scan:invisible && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck

pnpm.//: postcss override forces >=8.5.10 across the workspace because vite locks its bundled postcss at 8.5.9 (advisory GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 — XSS in stringify on </style>). REMOVE this override once vite ships postcss >=8.5.10 in its default tree (track on next vite minor).
